description: Sets the duration of the animation in seconds.

name: Animation:SetOrder
description: Sets the play order within the animation group.

name: Animation:SetSmoothing
description: Sets easing: IN, OUT, IN_OUT, or NONE.

name: Animation:SetStartDelay
description: Sets delay before the animation starts.
